label: Terrain Template Def
description: Procedural template that generates one TerrainDef per paired structure-type ColorDef at startup. The primary use case is carpet flooring, where each color variant becomes an implied terrain type.

texturePath.label: Texture path
texturePath.description: Asset path to the terrain texture shared by all generated color variants.

tags.label: Tags
tags.description: Categorization strings applied to all generated terrain variants, such as Floor or FineFloor.

researchPrerequisites.label: Research prerequisites
researchPrerequisites.description: Research projects that must be completed before any generated terrain from this template can be built.

burnedDef.label: Burned def
burnedDef.description: Terrain that each generated variant becomes when burned.

costList.label: Cost list
costList.description: Materials consumed when constructing a generated terrain. Each child element name is a ThingDef defName and the text content is the integer count.

designatorDropdown.label: Designator dropdown
designatorDropdown.description: Architect panel dropdown group that the generated designators are placed under.

statBases.label: Stat bases
statBases.description: Base stat values applied to all generated terrain variants. Each child element name is a StatDef defName.

uiOrder.label: UI order
uiOrder.description: Sort order of the generated designators in the Architect panel.

renderPrecedenceStart.label: Render precedence start
renderPrecedenceStart.description: Starting render priority for generated terrain variants. Each color variant is offset from this value by its index.

constructionSkillPrerequisite.label: Construction skill prerequisite
constructionSkillPrerequisite.description: Minimum construction skill level required to build any terrain generated from this template.

canGenerateDefaultDesignator.label: Can generate default designator
canGenerateDefaultDesignator.description: Whether the generator creates a default designator for each color variant. Set to false to suppress designator generation entirely.

dominantStyleCategory.label: Dominant style category
dominantStyleCategory.description: Ideological style category applied to all generated terrain variants.

basic-terrain-template.label: Basic terrain template
basic-terrain-template.description: Minimal carpet-style terrain template with a texture, construction cost, stat bases, and UI order. Maps to the structure of Carpet and CarpetFine in the base game.
